sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: US Military Drone Market Faces Overcrowding Amid High Demand
feed.summary: US military drone market is experiencing a boom, leading to an overcrowded space with companies vying for defense contracts. Investors tread with caution as the profitability of small drones in a saturated market remains uncertain for the defense sector.
